caption: A man is seated in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, surrounded by framed photographs on the wall and a white mannequin in the background. He is wearing a green baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a green t-shirt featuring the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT". He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. Two logos are visible on the screen: a circular black logo on the left and a red text logo that says "BODILY" on the right. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth opening and closing as he talks. His head shifts slightly, and his facial expressions change as he continues his conversation, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
